content:
Taurus December 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Reflect on shared depths, speak gently to those nearby
Key Dates New Moon Dec 7 (Sagittarius, 8th house) / Jupiter retrograde Dec 12 / Cold Full Moon Dec 24 (Cancer, 3rd house)
Love Venus post-shadow clears Dec 15; the Cold Moon lights siblings, neighbors, and daily conversation
Career 8th house New Moon reviews shared money and intimate partnerships; Capricorn season stabilizes career Dec 21
Crystal of the Month Moonstone
Lucky Colors Pearl white, soft silver, moonlit blue
Lucky Number 3
Affirmation I release what was never mine to carry; I speak kindly to those close to home.

This Month’s Energy

Taurus, December 2026 closes the year in two registers: deep reflection, then gentle conversation. The New Moon in Sagittarius on December 7 falls in your 8th house of shared resources, intimacy, and psychological depth — a quiet, honest audit of what you owe, what you’ve inherited, and what you’ve merged with another. Then Jupiter turns retrograde on December 12 at 27°01′ Leo (your 4th house), slowing a home or family expansion and inviting review. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 lands in your 3rd house of siblings, neighbors, writing, and daily talk — a tender, close-range celebration. December’s pattern: reflect on shared depths early, celebrate close conversations late.

Key Dates for Taurus in December 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Taurus Do / Avoid
Dec 7 New Moon in Sagittarius (your 8th house) Fresh start in shared money, debts, inheritances, intimate emotional exchange Do: renegotiate a loan, audit joint finances, address intimacy
Avoid: avoiding the difficult shared conversation
Dec 12 Jupiter turns retrograde in Leo (your 4th house) A home or family expansion pauses; review whether the plan still fits Do: re-examine the move, the renovation, the family promise
Avoid: forcing a property decision before February 2027
Dec 15 Venus post-retrograde shadow ends As Venus-ruled Taurus, this matters: love, money, and self-worth conversations finally settle Do: commit to the value, the price, the relationship standard
Avoid: re-opening the old Venus-retrograde worth-debate
Dec 21 Sun enters Capricorn (your 9th house) Capricorn season widens the view — travel, study, teaching, publishing through January Do: plan a 2027 course, trip, or publication
Avoid: staying stuck in the audit past mid-month
Dec 24 Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 3rd house) Siblings, neighbors, writing, short trips, daily conversation illuminated Do: call the sibling, write the letter, take the short trip home
Avoid: sharp words with close-range people at the table
Dec 31 Year-end threshold Natural review — what 2026 taught about shared resources and close ties Do: name what you released, what you deepened
Avoid: rushing into 2027 without the audit complete

Career & Money

For Taurus, December’s money story is about shared resources, not solo income. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 falls in your 8th house — debts, loans, taxes, inheritances, partner’s money, and merged assets. This is the moment to audit what you owe and what you’ve merged. If a joint financial arrangement has been quietly leaking, this New Moon names it.

Jupiter retrograde in your 4th house of home from December 12 pauses a property or family expansion — review, don’t force. Capricorn season (your 9th house) from December 21 widens the lens toward teaching, study, and travel — a sober, ambitious close to the year. Crystals for wealth can support the audit; the practical move is face the shared money early, then lift the eyes to 2027.

Love & Relationships

The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 falls in your 3rd house of siblings, neighbors, and daily conversation. For Taurus, this is the love signature of the month: tenderness lives in the near and the everyday. The phone call with the sibling, the chat with the neighbor, the letter you’ve been meaning to write.

Venus finishes her post-retrograde shadow on December 15 — and as Venus-ruled Taurus, you feel this most. Worth, love, and money conversations finally settle. The 8th house Sagittarius New Moon also deepens intimate partnership: shared resources and emotional vulnerability are inseparable now. Crystals for love can support the bond; the deeper practice is release what was never yours to carry, then speak gently to those nearby.

Health & Wellness

December asks Taurus to honor both depth and rhythm. The 8th house Sagittarius New Moon pulls you into psychological depth, while the 3rd house Cancer Cold Moon returns you to daily walk, talk, and movement. Venus-ruled Taurus carries tension in the throat, neck, and thyroid — holiday overwhelm lands here first.

Moonstone, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with cycles, emotional balance, and feminine lunar energy — a useful symbolic companion for a reflective, fluid month. Gentle neck stretches, warm drinks, slow walks, and a real bedtime carry you into January. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Moonstone

Why Moonstone fits Taurus this month. You are Venus-ruled and December asks you to do two things at once: reflect on shared depths (8th house) and speak gently to those nearby (3rd house). Moonstone — traditionally tied to lunar cycles, emotional balance, intuition, and new beginnings — is the stone that softens Taurus’ fixed earth without breaking the structure. Where Rose Quartz would warm further and Selenite would clarify, Moonstone carries water: gentle, pearlescent, with an earth-sign affinity for slow tides. Perfect for the 8th house Sagittarius New Moon (depth) and the 3rd house Cancer Cold Moon (close talk).

How to use it during December 2026. Place Moonstone on your nightstand or under your pillow on December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Carry it in your pocket from December 15 onward (Venus post-shadow clearing) through the Cold Moon.

Best date to use it: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer — hold Moonstone over your heart for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming one person close to home you’re grateful for.

Read more: Moonstone Meaning and Best Crystals for Taurus.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Taurus — December 2026

When: December 24, the Cold Full Moon in Cancer (your 3rd house).
Crystal: Moonstone.
Intention: Release what was never yours to carry; speak gently to those nearby.

  1. Cleanse Moonstone in moonlight on the night of December 7 (the Sagittarius New Moon). Place it on the windowsill where the moon will reach it.
  2. Set the intention in the two weeks between the New Moon and the Cold Moon (December 7–24): write down one shared burden you’re releasing — and three people close to home you want to speak to more gently in 2027.
  3. Act at the Cold Full Moon on December 24: call or write to one sibling, neighbor, or near friend. Hold Moonstone during the call; let the conversation be the ritual.
  4. Reflect at the Taurus New Moon in May 2027 (your 1st house): how has the gentle speaking matured through the winter? Hold Moonstone during the review.

Shop Taurus Crystals for December 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Taurus crystal guide for stones connected with love, abundance, grounding, and emotional balance — including the Moonstone that softens fixed earth through a reflective month. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Taurus December 2026

Is December 2026 a good month for Taurus?

It’s a reflect-and-speak month. The Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 (your 8th house) audits shared resources and intimacy. The Cold Full Moon in Cancer on December 24 (your 3rd house) celebrates close conversation with siblings and neighbors.

How will the Sagittarius New Moon on December 7 affect Taurus?

It falls in your 8th house of shared money, debts, intimacy, and inheritances — a fresh start in what you merge with another. Audit joint finances; address intimacy.

What does the Cold Moon in Cancer on December 24 mean for Taurus?

It falls in your 3rd house of siblings, neighbors, writing, and daily talk — a tender close-range culmination. Call the sibling; write the letter; take the short trip home.

How does Jupiter retrograde (Dec 12) affect Taurus?

Jupiter retrogrades in your 4th house of home and family. A property or family expansion pauses — review the move, renovation, or family promise rather than forcing it.

What is the best crystal for Taurus in December 2026?

Moonstone — it softens fixed earth through a fluid month, exactly what an 8th house Sagittarius New Moon plus a 3rd house Cancer Cold Moon demand. See the full Taurus crystal guide →
